etymology.description: 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") + 音(音) (yīn, "sound") = speaking with sound -> to speak slowly
etymology.interpretation: The character 㕯 combines 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth"), indicating an action related to speech, with 音(音) (yīn, "sound") to suggest producing sound, hence denoting speaking slowly or deliberately.
